sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n79380" key="parenekte/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παρεν-εκτέον</orth>, <sense id="n79380.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must bring in, apply</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">βοηθήματα</foreign> <abbr TEIform="abbr">v.l. in</abbr> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0671.tlg001:36:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Philum.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Ven.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">36.4</biblScope> </bibl> (ap.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg013:37" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">13.37</biblScope> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
